# sixtom

> AI ships demos. I ship products. A week pairing with someone on your team — they drive, I shape, we ship. $7,500 fixed. 1 client a month.

## What it is

- 1 week.
- You pair me with someone on your team.
- They drive. I shape. We ship.
- You keep the code.

## Who it's for

- You have a prototype that won't ship.
- An internal tool that won't scale past the person who built it.
- Someone on your team can build with AI but stalls before production.

## How it goes

- Day 0: 30-min intro call. We figure out the thing.
- Day 1: I show up. Meet who I'm pairing with.
- Days 1–5: They drive. I shape. The thing ships.
- Day 5: Live in production. You own it.
- Day 30: Check-in. What stuck, what didn't.

## Pricing

- $7,500 USD, fixed.
- 1 client a month, by appointment.
- If we're off track by day 3, we stop. You keep what we built. Pay for the time, that's it.

## How to engage

- Book a 30-min intro call (link on the homepage).
- Notify list for the next open slot (form on the homepage).
